cards.front: What is the Open Handset Alliance?
cards.back: A consortium of companies that developed Android OS

cards.front: What is the primary purpose of Android?
cards.back: To provide an open source mobile operating system
A mobile operating system developed by Google and the Open Handset Alliance

cards.front: What is the key feature of Android, that differentiates it from other mobile operating systems?

cards.back: By Google and the Open Handset Alliance
